brief_notes: Impressive multi-technique study combining 3D photogrammetry, intrinsic imaging, viral tracing, electrophysiology with optogenetics, and computational modeling. Tables provide precise quantitative data including laminar distributions, EPSC/IPSC amplitudes with latencies, and model predictions matching experimental suppression ratios (35.9% vs 36.3%). The ISN model identification is a strong mechanistic contribution. The logical progression from spatial overlap to anatomy to circuit to model is excellent.
